results.rendered_html:
saṃ-√sañj Pass. -sojyate, -sajjate (˚ti; pf. saṃ-sajjatuḥ,  MBh. ),
to adhere, stick to (loc.),  MBh. ;
to encounter, engage in close combat with (instr.; also ‘to attack’, with acc.),  ib. ;  BhP. ;
to hesitate, falter (in voice),  MBh. ;  R. ;
to flow together, be joined,  MBh. ;
to be occasioned, arise (as a battle),  ib. ;
(P.) to attach to a yoke, harness,  ib. ;  MBh. ix, 819  (B.)
